Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 78 

PL_VRSN 

LABEL: Plan File Version Representing the Iteration of the File 

DESCRIPTION: Indicator representing the iteration of the file. 

SHORT NAME: PL_VRSN 

LONG NAME: PL_VRSN 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: A two-character number (“01,” “02,” “14,” etc.) 

COMMENT: The higher the number, the later/more recent the
